    • validate

      Overrides:
      validate in class ObjectArgs.Builder<ComposeObjectArgs.Builder,ComposeObjectArgs>

    • sources

      public ComposeObjectArgs.Builder sources(List<SourceObject> sources)

    • delayMs

      public ComposeObjectArgs.Builder delayMs(long delayMs)
      Set delay between retries. Value <= 0 makes no delay (default 100ms).

    • maxRetries

      public ComposeObjectArgs.Builder maxRetries(int maxRetries)
      Set maximum retry between failure. Value <= 0 disables retry (default 5).
